backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin link removal, chat toggle, watermark removal, support tier) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'LuidCentral' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with six routes (client login/portal, master login/panel, staff login/panel), each with auth-based redirect guards, wrapped in AuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AddClientForm.ts: Form component allowing master admins to create new client records by entering a LUID ID and password, with validation, duplicate detection, and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/AllChatView.tsx: Admin/staff chat view that groups all localStorage chat messages by LUID ID into expandable accordion threads with inline reply functionality.
frontend/src/components/AllTicketsView.t: Displays all support tickets in an expandable list, allowing staff/admin to reply to messages and toggle ticket status between open and resolved.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Renders a live chat interface for a given LUID ID, polling messages every 3 seconds and showing an offline state when chat is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/ClientProfile.ts: Shows a modal dialog with a client's profile information (LUID ID, creation date, support tier) fetched by LUID ID.
frontend/src/components/ClientsTable.tsx: Renders a table of all registered clients with options to delete a client or change their support tier (Basic, Premium, Enterprise).
frontend/src/components/CreateTicket.tsx: Provides a form for clients to create a new support ticket with a subject and message, calling the db createTicket function on submission.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header displaying the app logo, the current user's role badge, a profile button for clients, and a logout action.
frontend/src/components/NotificationToas: A fixed-position toast notification component that animates in/out when a message is provided, displaying a bell icon, label, message text, and a close button.
frontend/src/components/StaffChatView.ts: A thin wrapper component for staff chat that simply renders the AllChatView component.
frontend/src/components/TicketDetail.tsx: Displays a support ticket's messages with reply input and open/resolved status toggle, using localStorage-backed db helpers for updates.
frontend/src/components/TicketList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of tickets for a given client ID, showing subject, message count, and open/resolved status with selection highlighting.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context with login/logout functions that persist the user session to either localStorage (stay logged in) or sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Polls localStorage-backed ticket and chat data on an interval to detect new activity, updating notification counts and triggering toast messages for relevant changes based on user role.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An intentionally empty module noting that all data operations use localStorage via lib/db.ts rather than backend canister queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark neon-green theme, and provides reusable component classes like glass-panel, neon-border, neon-btn, and status indicators.
frontend/src/lib/db.ts: Client-side localStorage-based data layer providing CRUD operations and password hashing/validation for clients, staff, and admins, along with ticket and chat message management.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ClientLogin.tsx: Client login page with a LUID ID and password form that validates credentials via localStorage and redirects to the client portal on success.
frontend/src/pages/ClientPortal.tsx: Main client dashboard page showing tabs for tickets and chat, a create-ticket button, and notification toasts, rendered only for authenticated client users.
frontend/src/pages/MasterLogin.tsx: Admin master login page with username/password form that validates against stored admin credentials and redirects to the master panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/MasterPanel.tsx: Admin panel page for the master user, providing navigation sections for adding clients, viewing clients/tickets/chat, and managing staff members with create/delete functionality and a chat online/offline toggle.
frontend/src/pages/StaffLogin.tsx: Login page for staff members at /staff, validating credentials against the internal DB and redirecting to the staff panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/StaffPanel.tsx: Staff panel page showing tickets and chat tabs with notification badges, a chat online/offline toggle, and a refresh control, accessible only to authenticated staff users.
frontend/src/types/db.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all internal database entities including Client, Staff, Admin, Ticket, Message, ChatMessage, and AuthUser.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with neon green colors, OKLCH-based surface/semantic tokens, custom mono/sans fonts, neon glow box shadows, and keyframe animations like neon-pulse and scan.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing LuidCentral's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions including localStorage-based persistence, hardcoded admin credentials, and support tier management.
